speaker: speaker1
text: Hi there , I want to reserve a hotel room .

speaker: speaker2
text: No problem at all . Could I have your full name , please ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Hi , Mr . Sandals . I'm Michelle , at your service . When do you need the room ?

speaker: speaker1
text: My plans are to be there April 14th to the 17th .

speaker: speaker2
text: We have new room rates , sir . Will that be acceptable to you ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , it depends on the price , of course . What is it ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I have no problem with that .

speaker: speaker2
text: Great ! Would you prefer smoking or nonsmoking ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Definitely nonsmoking . I can't handle that smell .

speaker: speaker2
text: Nonsmoking . Now , is a queen-size bed okay ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Great , Mr . Sandals . Your reservation is confirmed . Now all I need is your phone number .

speaker: speaker2
text: Thank you so much , Mr . Sandals . We look forward to seeing you !
